tools.name: get_contract
tools.title: Get RealDoor frozen contract
tools.description: Return the frozen RealDoor Boston FY2026 contract: geography, effective/simulation dates, evidence currency, stages, safety copy, and citation.

tools.name: mtsp_limit
tools.title: Look up frozen MTSP income limit
tools.description: Return the frozen HUD FY2026 MTSP annual income limit (USD) for the Boston-Cambridge-Quincy HMFA for a given household size (1-8) and AMI band (50 or 60). Household sizes outside 1-8 return null — RealDoor never extrapolates.

householdSize.description: Household size. Frozen table only covers 1-8.

amiBand.description: AMI band. Contract freezes only 50 and 60.

tools.name: list_demo_scenarios
tools.title: List RealDoor demo scenarios
tools.description: List the synthetic Boston demo scenarios (HH-003 default, HH-005 expired evidence, HH-002 injection attempt) used by the RealDoor prototype.

tools.name: safety_notice
tools.title: Get RealDoor safety and scope notice
tools.description: Return RealDoor's read-only scope, deflection rules, persistent notices, and the list of verdict terms the copilot never outputs (eligible, approved, denied, qualified, rejected, score, rank).
